_meta.description: 10 Genre-Templates aus dem Master-Guide, kommentiert mit Prompt-Logik

templates.name: Indie-Pop Anthem
templates.style_prompt: indie pop, clean guitar arps, warm pads, tight kick, bright female vocals, 102-112 BPM, polished mix
templates.explanation: Genre fuehrend, dann Instrumente (3 reichen), dann Vocal-Charakter, BPM-Range fuer Tempo-Anker, Production am Ende. Fuenf-Part-Formel exemplarisch.

templates.name: Lo-Fi Study Beat
templates.style_prompt: lofi hip hop, swung drums, vintage Rhodes, soft bass, no vocals, 70-84 BPM, dusty vinyl crackle, -12 LUFS vibe
templates.explanation: Negative 'no vocals' crowdet Vocals raus. 'dusty vinyl crackle' triggert Lo-Fi-Produktion. LUFS als Vibe-Referenz ist Experten-Move.

templates.name: Melodic House
templates.style_prompt: melodic house, side-chained bass, bright plucks, euphoric, 120-126 BPM, wide stereo field, festival energy
templates.explanation: Side-chained bass ist kritisches Detail fuer House. Wide stereo field + festival energy = Big Room-Production ohne zu viele Instrumente zu listen.

templates.name: Trap Banger
templates.style_prompt: trap, rattling triplet hats, tuned 808, sparse keys, confident male vocals, 140 BPM half-time feel, punchy compressed mix
templates.explanation: Half-time feel ist Genre-Indikator. Sparse keys belaesst Platz fuer Vocals. Triplet hats = Trap-Signature.

templates.name: Cinematic Trailer Pop
templates.style_prompt: cinematic pop, epic orchestral swells, powerful female vocals, light choir oohs, 88-110 BPM, triumphant, stadium reverb
templates.explanation: Stadium reverb = Trailer-Sound. 'Light choir oohs' statt voller Choir verhindert Overload. Triumphant mood koppelt an Genre.

templates.name: Acoustic Folk Story
templates.style_prompt: acoustic folk, fingerpicked guitar, light shaker, soft pads, warm male vocals, storytelling delivery, 90 BPM, intimate close
templates.explanation: 'Intimate close' triggert Dry-Room-Produktion. 'Storytelling delivery' fuer narrative Vocals. Minimalistische Instrumentierung.

templates.name: Synthwave Night-Drive
templates.style_prompt: synthwave, analog bass, gated snares, chorus guitars, Juno pads, 84-108 BPM, 80s neon nostalgia, polished retro production
templates.explanation: Gated snares = 80s-Signature. Juno pads ist spezifischer als 'synth pads'. '80s neon nostalgia' als Vibe-Keyword.

templates.name: Afro-Pop / Amapiano
templates.style_prompt: amapiano, afro-pop groove, call-and-response chorus, swing feel, log drums, warm bass, 106 BPM, feel-good energy
templates.explanation: Log drums = Amapiano-Signature. Call-and-response + swing feel koppeln Rhythm und Vocal-Struktur.

templates.name: K-Pop Hook Factory
templates.style_prompt: k-pop, sparkly synths, tight drums, bass drops, stacked harmonies, high contrast sections, 126 BPM, radio-ready mix
templates.explanation: 'High contrast sections' ist K-Pop-typisch (Breakdown-Drop-Wechsel). Stacked harmonies = Layered Vocals ohne zu spezifisch zu werden.

templates.name: R&B / Neo-Soul
templates.style_prompt: neo-soul, smooth female vocals, warm Rhodes, upright bass, soulful delivery, 78 BPM, intimate, analog warmth
templates.explanation: 'Analog warmth' + 'intimate' = Neo-Soul-Sound. Upright bass statt elektrisch ist stilistisch genau. Langsames Tempo (78 BPM) als Anker.
